message:
fix(mailbox-verdict/probe_schema_populated): wrap the probe DB connection in DbConnGuard so drop goes through close_sync()

Same fix as the earlier mail_ui/tui_poller round: `probe_schema_populated`
opened a short-lived sync connection to run a couple of COUNT(*)
queries and let it drop, triggering the FrankenConnection `drop_close`
warn on every mailbox verdict probe.

Wrap the connection in `crate::guard_db_conn(conn,
"mailbox_verdict::probe_schema_populated")` so the `DbConnGuard`'s
Drop impl runs `close_sync()` before `FrankenConnection`'s own Drop
fires.

Cargo.lock also picks up the `bumpalo` transitive introduced in the
sibling frankensqlite repo (resolved through workspace path deps).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
